goals: Build a 24/7 digital patient triage system handling 1200+ daily inquiries across 15 clinics
Accurately score patient urgency and route to the appropriate specialist
Generate structured clinical summaries for receiving physicians
Reduce triage time from 12-20 minutes to under 3 minutes per patient
Maintain strict HIPAA compliance for all PHI handling

functional.description: Conduct conversational symptom assessment (onset, severity 1-10, duration, history)
Assign urgency level: Emergency / Urgent / Standard / Routine
Immediately escalate Emergency cases to on-call staff
Check patient current medications for dangerous drug interactions
Route to appropriate specialist department based on symptom pattern
Generate structured clinical note in SOAP format for the receiving physician
Ensure all PHI is encrypted at rest and in transit
Redact PHI from all application logs (HIPAA compliance)
Maintain patient consent tracking for data processing
Provide patient-facing portal with triage status and appointment details
